channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: "No One Will Control Hormuz": Trump Warns As US, Iran "Negotiating On Fumes"

media:content.media:description: The Strait of Hormuz remains all but shut since the war broke out in the Middle East on February 28.

item.description: Round after round of talks have ended without conclusion, leading a frustrated Trump to say the Iranian side is "negotiating on fumes".
item.content:encoded: Round after round of talks have ended without conclusion, leading a frustrated Trump to say the Iranian side is "negotiating on fumes".

item.title: "I Don't Care About Midterms": Trump Dismisses Iran War Fallout

media:content.media:description: The president had initially said the war would last four to six weeks

item.description: "They thought they were going to outwait me," Trump said at a White House cabinet meeting, referring to Iran's leadership. "You know, 'We'll outwait him. He's got the midterms.' I don't care about the midterms."
item.content:encoded: "They thought they were going to outwait me," Trump said at a White House cabinet meeting, referring to Iran's leadership. "You know, 'We'll outwait him. He's got the midterms.' I don't care about the midterms."

item.title: Indian Living Illegally In US Arrested For Assaulting Man With Baseball Bat

media:content.media:description: The man had illegally entered the US at an unknown date and time, the statement said.

item.description: An Indian national assaulted a man with a baseball bat and was released by sanctuary politicians without ICE alert.
item.content:encoded: An Indian national assaulted a man with a baseball bat and was released by sanctuary politicians without ICE alert.

item.title: Viral 'Donald Trump' Buffalo Spared From Eid Sacrifice, Moved To Bangladesh Zoo

media:content.media:description: The buffalo's owner earlier said it is "very calm" in nature.

item.description: Zoo officials reportedly said the move was intended to protect the animal amid the viral attention and to give visitors a chance to see it safely.
item.content:encoded: Zoo officials reportedly said the move was intended to protect the animal amid the viral attention and to give visitors a chance to see it safely.

item.title: Iran War LIVE Updates: US Strikes Iranian Military Site After 'Negotiating On Fumes' Warning
item.description: US Iran War LIVE Updates: US President Donald Trump had on Wednesday dismissed an Iranian state media report that Iran and Oman would jointly manage shipping through the Strait of Hormuz
item.content:encoded: US Iran War LIVE Updates: US President Donald Trump had on Wednesday dismissed an Iranian state media report that Iran and Oman would jointly manage shipping through the Strait of Hormuz

item.title: How A Google Techie Made Rs 11.5 Crore Betting On D4vd, Accused Murderer Who Topped 2025 Searches

media:content.media:description: Google staff charged with fraud and money laundering for trading on confidential data.

item.description: A Google employee has been arrested for $1.2 million (Rs 11.5 crore) fraud after he bet on Polymarket using internal search data.
item.content:encoded: A Google employee has been arrested for $1.2 million (Rs 11.5 crore) fraud after he bet on Polymarket using internal search data.

item.title: US To Set Up Ebola Quarantine Facility In Kenya For Americans

media:content.media:description: It was unclear where in Kenya the new facility will be built.

item.description: Donald Trump's administration is planning to send Americans who are exposed to Ebola while abroad to a new facility in Kenya instead of flying them to the United States, an administration official said Wednesday.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump's administration is planning to send Americans who are exposed to Ebola while abroad to a new facility in Kenya instead of flying them to the United States, an administration official said Wednesday.

item.title: US-Iran War Highlights: US Army Carries Out New Strikes In Iran Against Military Site
item.description: Iran War: The US military on Monday carried out strikes on Iranian missile launch sites and boats laying mines.
item.content:encoded: Iran War: The US military on Monday carried out strikes on Iranian missile launch sites and boats laying mines.

item.title: US Carries Out New Strikes In Iran Against Military Site, Intercepts Drones

media:content.media:description: US military has also intercepted and shot down multiple Iranian drones in new strikes against Iran.

item.description: US-Iran War Latest News: US Carries Out New Strikes In Iran, Intercepts Iranian Drones, Strait Of Hormuz
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1105331/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>US-Iran War Latest News: US Carries Out New Strikes In Iran, Intercepts Iranian Drones, Strait Of Hormuz

item.title: Matthew Perry's Assistant Gets Over 3 Years In Jail In Actor's Death Case

media:content.media:description: 'Friends' actor Matthew Perry, 58, was died in october 2023.

item.description: Judge Sherilyn Peace Garnett handed down the sentence to 60-year-old Kenneth Iwamasa in federal court in Los Angeles. He was also sentenced to two years of probation and a $10,000 fine.
item.content:encoded: Judge Sherilyn Peace Garnett handed down the sentence to 60-year-old Kenneth Iwamasa in federal court in Los Angeles. He was also sentenced to two years of probation and a $10,000 fine.

item.title: Zelensky Urges Trump For More Missiles, Air Defence To Counter Russia

media:content.media:description: Zelensky asked Trump to provide Patriot PAC-3 missiles and other air defense systems.

item.description: Volodymyr Zelensky urged Trump and Congress in a letter to supply more Patriot PAC-3 missiles and other air defence systems, warning that deliveries to Ukraine are falling dangerously short as the Iran war diverts US stocks.
item.content:encoded: Volodymyr Zelensky urged Trump and Congress in a letter to supply more Patriot PAC-3 missiles and other air defence systems, warning that deliveries to Ukraine are falling dangerously short as the Iran war diverts US stocks.

item.title: Meta Launches Paid Subscriptions For Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp

media:content.media:description: Meta's stock rose nearly three percent on the news.

item.description: Meta on Wednesday launched paid subscription plans for its flagship apps, marking a major push by the tech giant to diversify beyond its longtime reliance on advertising revenue.
item.content:encoded: Meta on Wednesday launched paid subscription plans for its flagship apps, marking a major push by the tech giant to diversify beyond its longtime reliance on advertising revenue.

item.title: "Would Blow Them Up": Trump Threatens To Attack Oman Amid Hormuz Standoff

media:content.media:description: During meeting, Trump said Oman must "behave" or he would "blow them up."

item.description: Oman is a key US ally which has tried to mediate the Middle East war and has itself come under attack from Tehran.
item.content:encoded: Oman is a key US ally which has tried to mediate the Middle East war and has itself come under attack from Tehran.

item.title: Rubio's India Visit Seals Landmark Deals On Critical Minerals, Energy And Tech

media:content.media:description: The visit arrives at a moment when global supply chains are under stress

item.description: The announcement was further reinforced at the multilateral level, where the Quad - comprising the United States, India, Japan, and Australia - unveiled its own Critical Minerals Framework on the sidelines of the New Delhi meeting.
item.content:encoded: The announcement was further reinforced at the multilateral level, where the Quad - comprising the United States, India, Japan, and Australia - unveiled its own Critical Minerals Framework on the sidelines of the New Delhi meeting.

item.title: Ex-Cop's Daring 30-Hour Escape From China. It Took Him 4 Attempts

media:content.media:description: Dong, 68, once worked as a police officer in Zhengzhou in central China

item.description: Dong Guangping, a former police officer from China, was rescued by the South Korean Coast Guard after fishermen spotted his boat near the country's western coast on Monday. Dong has spent years trying to flee China and reunite with his family, who we
item.content:encoded: Dong Guangping, a former police officer from China, was rescued by the South Korean Coast Guard after fishermen spotted his boat near the country's western coast on Monday. Dong has spent years trying to flee China and reunite with his family, who we

item.title: Germany's Most Wanted Woman Sentenced To 13 Years After Decades On The Run

media:content.media:description: She was apprehended in Berlin in 2024, after 30 years on the run.

item.description: Triple Espresso, Daniela Klette
item.content:encoded: Triple Espresso, Daniela Klette

item.title: Iran's Big Claim On Deal To Reopen Hormuz, US Calls It "Fabrication"

media:content.media:description: The draft also mentioned that the strait will not be reopened "unconditionally"

item.description: The Iranian state television cited what it said was the draft of a potential "memorandum of understanding". However, it clarified that the text had not been "finalised" as of yet.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1105289/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>The Iranian state television cited what it said was the draft of a potential "memorandum of understanding". However, it clarified that the text had not been "finalised" as of yet.

item.title: Xi Vowed To Curb Smoking, But Cigarette Sales Tell A Different China Story

media:content.media:description: China sits at the centre of the tobacco industry, with 2.44 trillion cigarettes sold annually

item.description: China's cigarette packaging also looks strikingly different from that in many countries. Instead of graphic health warnings, packs typically feature a single-line caution alongside national imagery such as pandas or the Gate of Heavenly Peace.
item.content:encoded: China's cigarette packaging also looks strikingly different from that in many countries. Instead of graphic health warnings, packs typically feature a single-line caution alongside national imagery such as pandas or the Gate of Heavenly Peace.

item.title: Russian Lawmakers Want Banks, Their Staff To Help Fight Ukrainian Drones

media:content.media:description: Russia is finding it hard to protect its large land mass from a growing number of attacks

item.description: Russian bank staff and branches could be joining the fight against Ukrainian drone attacks under an ambitious plan approved by the country's lower house of parliament.
item.content:encoded: Russian bank staff and branches could be joining the fight against Ukrainian drone attacks under an ambitious plan approved by the country's lower house of parliament.

item.title: Iran Says "Low" Possibility Of Return To War With US

media:content.media:description: The statement came a day after Iran accused the US of breaching the ceasefire

item.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guards said on Wednesday that a return to war with the United States was unlikely, but warned the Islamic republic stood ready to respond to any attack.
item.content:encoded: Iran's Revolutionary Guards said on Wednesday that a return to war with the United States was unlikely, but warned the Islamic republic stood ready to respond to any attack.
